query:
-- Contar estructuras físicas únicas agrupando por base numérica
-- Ej: 601A y 601B = 1 estructura física "601"
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT REGEXP_REPLACE(cobertizo_id, '[A-Za-z]+$', '')) as paradas_fisicas
FROM paradas;

-- Ver cuántas bases numéricas tienen múltiples letras (A, B, C...)
SELECT base, COUNT(DISTINCT cobertizo_id) as variantes, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT cobertizo_id ORDER BY cobertizo_id) as ids
FROM (
  SELECT cobertizo_id, REGEXP_REPLACE(cobertizo_id, '[A-Za-z]+$', '') as base
  FROM paradas
) t
GROUP BY base
HAVING variantes > 1
ORDER BY CAST(base AS UNSIGNED)
LIMIT 20;
